title: Revenge.
content:
Man's disposition is for to requite
    An injury, before a benefit:
    Thanksgiving is a burden and a pain;
    Revenge is pleasing to us, as our gain.
meaning:
"Revenge." is a quintessential example of Robert Herrick's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
